name: Elowen
archetype: Level 11 Druid - The tree-obsessed botanist who roleplays a dryad
speech_patterns: Uses tree metaphors for absolutely everything
Speaks protectively about nature and expresses distress at harm to it
Refers to herself and others using tree-related terms
quirks: Apologizes to trees when entering wooden structures or using wooden items
Insists on being called 'Elder Elm' or 'Sister Sapling' instead of her name
Celebrates when party members level up by saying they're 'adding growth rings'
example_phrases: My roots run deep here. I'll hold the line like an old oak.
These stone halls suffocate me. Do you not miss the canopy, friends?
Forgive me, ancient timber... *touches wooden door sadly*
Your skills are branching beautifully! Keep growing, little seedling.
I sense corruption in this grove... wait, it's a dungeon. Right. Still corrupted though.
